name: John Doe
history: Recent divorce. Financial struggles and adjustment to single life. Co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated after the divorce. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must keep a distance from emotions to stay in control.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I let myself feel too deeply, I will lose control.
coping_strategies: Uses humor and sarcasm as a defense mechanism to avoid confronting emotions.
situation: Managing financial hardship following the divorce, including handling financial paperwork.
auto_thought: No matter how hard I work, I don't quite pull it off.
behavior: Jokes and laughs to deflect from discussing deeper emotions.
